title: Three die after suspected hantavirus outbreak on Atlantic cruise ship
description: The World Health Organization said one case of hantavirus infection has been confirmed, with five more suspected cases under investigation.
content:
Three people have died after a suspected virus outbreak on a cruise ship sailing in the Atlantic, the World Health Organization (WHO) has told the BBC.

title: Heathrow in talks with airlines to end row that could delay third runway
description: Airport seeks deal with BA owner, Virgin and billionaire local landowner, who has own expansion plan, over cost and service issues
content:
Heathrow’s new chair has opened talks with airlines and the billionaire local landowner Surinder Arora to defuse a row that threatens to further delay the £49bn plan to build a third runway at Europe’s busiest airport.

title: Iran says US has responded to its latest peace proposal
description: Before reviewing the proposal on Saturday, US President Donald Trump said he could not imagine it "would be acceptable".
content:
Iran has received a US response to its latest peace proposal, Iranian state-linked media have said.
Iran's foreign ministry spokesperson said the response - which was delivered via Pakistan - was now being reviewed, according to Tasnim news agency.

title: Boy, 4, fighting for life after drowning in hotel pool at British holiday hotspot
description: The child was pulled from the water on the south side of Gran Canaria on Saturday afternoon.
content:
A four-year-old boy is fighting for his life after he drowned at a hotel pool in Gran Canaria.
The child was pulled from the water on the south side of British holiday hotspot on Saturday afternoon.

title: Woman and man killed and three others injured in ‘suspicious’ blast
description: Avon and Somerset Police were called to a ‘domestic-related incident’ at the address
content:
A man and woman have died after a “suspicious” explosion at a house in Bristol, which has hospitalised three people.
Avon and Somerset Police declared a major incident after the explosion at an address in Sterncourt Road at around 6.30am on Sunday.
